name: KFC Coleslaw
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, combine the sugar and salt.
2. Add the pepper, milk, mayonnaise, buttermilk, white vinegar, and lemon juice to the bowl with the sugar mixture.
3. Beat all ingredients until smooth.
4. Add the finely chopped cabbage and shredded carrot to the mixture.
5. Mix well to ensure everything is evenly incorporated.
6. Cover the bowl and chill for at least 2 hours before serving.
